holdings.infoBox: DUSG is an equity ETF with a total of 560 individual holdings. The top holdings are DFA Short Term Investment stock at 8.08%, Sterling Infrastructure at 1.15%, Exelixis at 0.68%, IES Holdings at 0.65%, and Aramark at 0.64%.

overview.description: The U.S. Small Cap Growth Portfolio: ETF (DUSG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in small-cap stocks. The fund seeks long-term capital appreciation through an actively managed portfolio of US small-cap stocks that exhibit growth characteristics.   DUSG was launched on Dec 20, 2012 and is issued by Dimensional.
